---
title: "Contact"
---

<style>
.contact-wrapper {
  padding: 40px 20px;
  color: #111;
}

.contact-wrapper form input,
.contact-wrapper form textarea {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 500px;
  padding: 8px;
  margin-top: 4px;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.contact-wrapper form button {
  margin-top: 10px;
  padding: 10px 24px;
  background-color: #444;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.contact-wrapper form button:hover {
  background-color: #222;
}
</style>

<div class="contact-wrapper">

You can reach me via:

- **Email:** cait.oreillyogrady242@mail.dcu.ie
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/yourname](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourname/)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/cait-oreilly](https://github.com/cait-oreilly)

Or fill out the contact form below:

<form>
  <label>Name:</label><br>
  <input type="text" name="name"><br><br>
  <label>Email:</label><br>
  <input type="email" name="email"><br><br>
  <label>Message:</label><br>
  <textarea name="message" rows="5"></textarea><br><br>
  <button type="submit">Send</button>
</form>

</div>
